title: Python Built-in Functions for Looping
description: A flowchart showing the logic and primary use cases for Python's built-in looping functions: enumerate(), zip(), range(), and sorted().
relationships: enumerate() adds a counter to the iterable
zip() aggregates elements from multiple iterables
range() generates a sequence of numbers
sorted() returns a new sorted list from the iterable
All functions provide an iterable output for a for-loop
